facebook.caption:
4.9 stars. 109 reviews. At an amusement park most tourists have never heard of.

Ngoc Hien Treasure sits out in Rạch Vẹm, far from the resort strip. Families who find it keep rating it nearly perfect. That number doesn't happen by accident.

If you're traveling with kids or just want something different from beach days, add this to the list.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
